method.name: SetDoubleClickTime

arg.name: double_click_time
arg.description: Double click time.

method.description: Maximum time allowed between two clicks for them to be considered a double click (in milliseconds).

method.name: SetDoubleClickDistance

arg.name: double_click_distance
arg.description: Double click distance in pixels.

method.description: Maximum distance allowed between two clicks for them to be considered a double click (in pixels).

method.name: SetDndDragThreshold

arg.name: dnd_drag_threshold
arg.description: Drag threshold in pixels.

method.description: Number of pixels the cursor can move before dragging.

method.name: SetCursorBlink

arg.name: cursor_blink
arg.description: Whether cursor should blink.

method.description: Whether the cursor should blink.

method.name: SetCursorBlinkTime

arg.name: cursor_blink_time
arg.description: Cursor blink cycle length in milliseconds.

method.description: Length of the cursor blink cycle, in milleseconds.

method.name: SetThemeName

arg.name: theme_name
arg.description: Name of GTK theme.

method.description: Name of gtk theme to use.

method.name: SetIconThemeName

arg.name: icon_theme_name
arg.description: Name of icon theme.

method.description: Name of icon theme to use for icons.

method.name: SetEnableEventSounds

arg.name: enable_event_sounds
arg.description: Whether to play sounds on user events.

method.description: Whether to play sounds on user events.

method.name: SetSoundThemeName

arg.name: sound_theme_name
arg.description: The XDG sound theme name.

method.description: The XDG sound theme to use for event sounds.

method.name: SetEnableInputFeedbackSounds

arg.name: enable_input_feedback_sounds
arg.description: Whether to play sounds on input events.

method.description: Whether to play sounds on input events.

method.name: SetXftAntialias

arg.name: xft_antialias
arg.description: Whether to antialias Xft fonts; 0=no, 1=yes, -1=default.

method.description: Whether to antialias Xft fonts; 0=no, 1=yes, -1=default.

method.name: SetXftHinting

arg.name: xft_hinting
arg.description: Whether to hint Xft fonts; 0=no, 1=yes, -1=default.

method.description: Whether to hint Xft fonts; 0=no, 1=yes, -1=default.

method.name: SetXftHintStyle

arg.name: xft_hint_style
arg.description: What degree of hinting to use.

method.description: What degree of hinting to use; "hintnone", "hintslight", "hintmedium", or "hintfull".

method.name: SetXftRGBA

arg.name: xft_rgba
arg.description: Type of subpixel antialiasing.

method.description: Type of subpixel antialiasing; "rgba", "rgb", "bgr", "vrgb", "vbgr".

method.name: SetXftDPI

arg.name: xft_dpi
arg.description: Resolution for Xft, in 1024 * dots/inch.

method.description: Resolution for Xft, in 1024 * dots/inch. -1 to use default value. Do not modify it manually.

method.name: SetFontDPI

arg.name: font_dpi
arg.description: The resolution used for converting font sizes to pixel sizes, in dots per inch.

method.description: The resolution used for converting font sizes to pixel sizes, in dots per inch.

method.name: SetCursorThemeName

arg.name: cursor_theme_name
arg.description: Name of the cursor theme.

method.description: Name of the cursor theme.

method.name: SetCursorThemeSize

arg.name: cursor_theme_size
arg.description: Size of the cursor referenced by cursor_theme.

method.description: Size of the cursor referenced by cursor_theme.

method.name: SetCursorBlinkTimeout

arg.name: cursor_blink_timeout
arg.description: Time in seconds after which the cursor is hidden when blinking is enabled.

method.description: Time in seconds after which the cursor is hidden when blinking is enabled.

method.name: SetFontName

arg.name: font_name
arg.description: Name of default font to use.

method.description: Name of default font to use.

method.name: SetKeyThemeName

arg.name: key_theme_name
arg.description: Name of key theme RC file to load.

method.description: Name of key theme RC file to load.

method.name: SetToolbarStyle

arg.name: toolbar_style
arg.description: Whether default toolbars have text only, text and icons, icons only, etc.

method.description: Whether default toolbars have text only, text and icons, icons only, etc.

method.name: SetToolbarIconsSize

arg.name: toolbar_icons_size
arg.description: Size of icons in default toolbars.

method.description: Size of icons in default toolbars.

method.name: SetImPreeditStyle

arg.name: im_preedit_style
arg.description: How to draw the input method preedit string.

method.description: How to draw the input method preedit string.

method.name: SetImStatusStyle

arg.name: im_status_style
arg.description: How to draw the input method statusbar.

method.description: How to draw the input method statusbar.

method.name: SetImModule

arg.name: im_module
arg.description: Name of the input method module used by GTK+.

method.description: Name of the input method module used by GTK+.

method.name: SetMenuImages

arg.name: menu_images
arg.description: Whether images should be shown in menus.

method.description: Whether images should be shown in menus.

method.name: SetButtonImages

arg.name: button_images
arg.description: Whether stock icons should be shown in buttons.

method.description: Whether stock icons should be shown in buttons.

method.name: SetMenubarAccel

arg.name: menubar_accel
arg.description: The accelerator for moving the focus to the menubar.

method.description: The accelerator for moving the focus to the menubar.

method.name: SetColorScheme

arg.name: color_scheme
arg.description: A '\n' separated list of "name:color" as defined by the 'gtk-color-scheme' setting.

method.description: A '\n' separated list of "name:color" as defined by the 'gtk-color-scheme' setting.

method.name: SetFileChooserBackend

arg.name: file_chooser_backend
arg.description: Module to use as the filesystem model for the GtkFileChooser widget.

method.description: Module to use as the filesystem model for the GtkFileChooser widget. Possible values are "gio" and "gtk+".

method.name: SetDecorationLayout

arg.name: decoration_layout
arg.description: This setting determines which buttons should be put in the titlebar of client-side decorated windows.

method.description: This setting determines which buttons should be put in the titlebar of client-side decorated windows, and whether they should be placed at the left of right.

method.name: SetShellShowsAppMenu

arg.name: shell_shows_app_menu
arg.description: This setting determines where application menu will be displayed.

method.description: This setting determines where application menu will be displayed - in a window or on a panel with MenuModel protocol.

method.name: SetShellShowsMenubar

arg.name: shell_shows_menubar
arg.description: This setting determines where window menubars will be displayed.

method.description: This setting determines where window menubars will be displayed - in a window or on a panel with MenuModel protocol.

method.name: SetShowInputMethodMenu

arg.name: show_input_method_menu
arg.description: Whether the context menus of entries and text views should offer to change the input method.

method.description: Whether the context menus of entries and text views should offer to change the input method.

method.name: SetShowUnicodeMenu

arg.name: show_unicode_menu
arg.description: Whether the context menus of entries and text views should offer to insert control characters.

method.description: Whether the context menus of entries and text views should offer to insert control characters.

method.name: SetAutomaticMnemonics

arg.name: automatic_mnemonics
arg.description: Whether mnemonics should be automatically shown and hidden when the user presses the Alt key.

method.description: Whether mnemonics should be automatically shown and hidden when the user presses the Alt key.

method.name: SetEnablePrimaryPaste

arg.name: enable_primary_paste
arg.description: If true, gtk+ uses the primary paste selection.

method.description: If true, gtk+ uses the primary paste selection, usually triggered by a middle mouse button click.

method.name: SetEnableAnimations

arg.name: enable_animations
arg.description: Whether to enable toolkit-wide animations.

method.description: Whether to enable toolkit-wide animations.

method.name: SetDialogsUseHeader

arg.name: dialogs_use_header
arg.description: Whether builtin GTK+ dialogs will use a header bar.

method.description: Whether builtin GTK+ dialogs such as the file chooser, the color chooser or the font chooser will use a header bar at the top to show action widgets, or an action area at the bottom.

method.name: SetWindowScalingFactor

arg.name: window_scaling_factor
arg.description: This controls the GTK scale factor.

method.description: This controls the GTK scale factor that maps from window coordinates to the actual device pixels.

property.name: DoubleClickTime
property.description: Double click time.

property.name: DoubleClickDistance
property.description: Maximum distance allowed between two clicks for them to be considered a double click (in pixels).

property.name: DndDragThreshold
property.description: Number of pixels the cursor can move before dragging.

property.name: CursorBlink
property.description: Whether the cursor should blink.

property.name: CursorBlinkTime
property.description: Length of the cursor blink cycle, in milleseconds.

property.name: ThemeName
property.description: Name of gtk theme to use.

property.name: IconThemeName
property.description: Name of icon theme to use for icons.

property.name: EnableEventSounds
property.description: Whether to play sounds on user events.

property.name: SoundThemeName
property.description: The XDG sound theme to use for event sounds.

property.name: EnableInputFeedbackSounds
property.description: Whether to play sounds on input events.

property.name: XftAntialias
property.description: Whether to antialias Xft fonts; 0=no, 1=yes, -1=default.

property.name: XftHinting
property.description: Whether to hint Xft fonts; 0=no, 1=yes, -1=default.

property.name: XftHintStyle
property.description: What degree of hinting to use; "hintnone", "hintslight", "hintmedium", or "hintfull".

property.name: XftRgba
property.description: Type of subpixel antialiasing; "rgba", "rgb", "bgr", "vrgb", "vbgr".

property.name: XftDPI
property.description: Resolution for Xft, in 1024 * dots/inch. -1 to use default value. Do not modify it manually.

property.name: FontDPI
property.description: The resolution used for converting font sizes to pixel sizes, in dots per inch.

property.name: CursorThemeName
property.description: Name of the cursor theme.

property.name: CursorThemeSize
property.description: Size of the cursor referenced by cursor_theme.

property.name: CursorBlinkTimeout
property.description: Time in seconds after which the cursor is hidden when blinking is enabled.

property.name: FontName
property.description: Name of default font to use.

property.name: KeyThemeName
property.description: Name of key theme RC file to load.

property.name: ToolbarStyle
property.description: Whether default toolbars have text only, text and icons, icons only, etc.

property.name: ToolbarIconsSize
property.description: Size of icons in default toolbars.

property.name: ImPreeditStyle
property.description: How to draw the input method preedit string.

property.name: ImStatusStyle
property.description: How to draw the input method statusbar.

property.name: ImModule
property.description: Name of the input method module used by GTK+.

property.name: MenuImages
property.description: Whether images should be shown in menus.

property.name: ButtonImages
property.description: Whether stock icons should be shown in buttons.

property.name: MenubarAccel
property.description: The accelerator for moving the focus to the menubar.

property.name: ColorScheme
property.description: A '\n' separated list of "name:color" as defined by the 'gtk-color-scheme' setting.

property.name: FileChooserBackend
property.description: Module to use as the filesystem model for the GtkFileChooser widget. Possible values are "gio" and "gtk+".

property.name: DecorationLayout
property.description: This setting determines which buttons should be put in the titlebar of client-side decorated windows, and whether they should be placed at the left of right.

property.name: ShellShowsAppMenu
property.description: This setting determines where application menu will be displayed - in a window or on a panel with MenuModel protocol.

property.name: ShellShowsMenubar
property.description: This setting determines where window menubars will be displayed - in a window or on a panel with MenuModel protocol.

property.name: ShowInputMethodMenu
property.description: Whether the context menus of entries and text views should offer to change the input method.

property.name: ShowUnicodeMenu
property.description: Whether the context menus of entries and text views should offer to insert control characters.

property.name: AutomaticMnemonics
property.description: Whether mnemonics should be automatically shown and hidden when the user presses the Alt key.

property.name: EnablePrimaryPaste
property.description: If true, gtk+ uses the primary paste selection, usually triggered by a middle mouse button click.

property.name: EnableAnimations
property.description: Whether to enable toolkit-wide animations.

property.name: DialogsUseHeader
property.description: Whether builtin GTK+ dialogs such as the file chooser, the color chooser or the font chooser will use a header bar at the top to show action widgets, or an action area at the bottom.

property.name: WindowScalingFactor
property.description: This controls the GTK scale factor that maps from window coordinates to the actual device pixels.
